BidStatus.description: Status of a bid in a secondary market trade. SUBMITTED: bid has been formally submitted and is awaiting review. ACCEPTED: bid has been accepted by the seller. REJECTED: bid has been declined by the seller. EXPIRED: bid validity period has elapsed without acceptance. WITHDRAWN: bid has been voluntarily retracted by the bidder.

OfferStatus.description: Status of an offer in a secondary market trade. ACTIVE: offer is currently listed and open for bids. ACCEPTED: offer has been accepted by a buyer. EXPIRED: offer listing period has elapsed without acceptance. WITHDRAWN: offer has been voluntarily removed by the seller.
